mapper.select: SELECT id, username, work_years, age, gender, resume_content, created_at, updated_at FROM resume ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE resume SET username = #{username}, work_years = #{workYears}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, resume_content = #{resumeContent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume (username, work_years, age, gender, resume_content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{workYears}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{resumeContent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
